---
title: "Blog"
---

Thank you for visiting my Projects page. The purpose of this page aims at providing employers an exploration of the different projects that I will be exploring in Engineering School at the University of Guelph. As more fundamental knowledge of the Engineering Discipline increases the amount of projects that I will intake will **increase**. Look below at the following sections that I plan to become involved in throughout my Engineering Journey.


## Engineering Projects

###  Software & Programming

#### Current Projects

- TBD 

#### Past Projects

- Coming Soon

### Computational Science

#### Current Projects

- TBD 

#### Past Projects

- Coming Soon

### Hardware Design

#### Current Projects

- TBD

#### Past Projects

- Coming Soon


### Personal

#### Current Projects

- TBD

#### Past Projects

- Coming Soon

### Other
